title: Plain Round Balloons - 5 Inch White, Blue & Light-Blue for Birthday, Baby Shower, Engagement & Wedding Parties - Pack of 25 Latex Balloons
features: PLAIN BALLOONS SET - 5 inch Plain 3 Colour Combo Balloons of White, Blue & Light-Blue 25 pieces. These colourful balloons are perfect for birthday wedding and party decorations.

NON-TOXIC AND SAFE - Balloons are crafted with a premium quality, thick natural latex that is non-toxic. Made to be extra durable. Once inflated they will last for weeks. These kids’ party balloon to create a wonderful atmosphere that your guests won’t forget.

WHAT TO FILL WITH - These birthday balloons can be filled with air and helium. These balloons filled with AIR will stay full for up to 72 hours, while with HELIUM will stay full for 3-6 hours. These balloons for party are durable and 20% thicker than average balloons. Ideal for theme party decorations.

APPLICATIONS - These colourful latex balloons are perfect for birthday decorations for girls boys women men, party supplies, party décor, making balloon arch, rainbow balloon garland, rainbow balloon arch, photo backdrop, also wedding, anniversary, engagement, hen party bachelorette, graduation, carnivals, gaming, all festivals and parties.

GORGEOUS PARTY DÉCOR - These 5 inch plain balloons are perfect for parties, Photography, Wedding, Birthday party, Baby shower, Festivals Decorations, family gatherings, schools, shopping malls, offices, door decorations and bars.
